novel_features.name: Sync
novel_features.description: Pull all DoorLoop entities into a local SQLite database for instant offline queries.

novel_features.name: Delinquency Report
novel_features.description: See every tenant with an outstanding balance, with their contact info and days past due — one command instead of three clicks per tenant.

novel_features.name: Cash Flow Snapshot
novel_features.description: Get income, expenses, and net cash flow per property for any date range — faster than navigating DoorLoop's PDF reports.

novel_features.name: Lease Ledger
novel_features.description: View a chronological bank-statement-style ledger for any lease: every charge, payment, credit, and returned payment with running balance.

novel_features.name: Vacancy Map
novel_features.description: Find every vacant unit across your portfolio — units with no active lease — with days vacant and last lease end date.

novel_features.name: Expiring Leases Alert
novel_features.description: List all leases expiring within N days with tenant contact info and whether a prospect already exists for the unit.

novel_features.name: Task Agenda
novel_features.description: See today's tasks bucketed as OVERDUE, DUE TODAY, and DUE THIS WEEK — with property and assignee — ready to act on without opening a browser.

novel_features.name: Portfolio Health
novel_features.description: One-row-per-portfolio summary: total units, occupancy rate, total outstanding balance, and leases expiring within 30 days.
